creator: iakrevetko@gmail.com
text:
Can't upgrade tcl86 from ports. Package creation is broken. It ends with following error:

===>  Building package for tcl86-8.6.2
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/lang/tcl86/work/stage/usr/local/lib/tcl8.6/auto.tcl): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/lang/tcl86/work/stage/usr/local/lib/tcl8.6/clock.tcl): No such file or directory

pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/lang/tcl86/work/stage/usr/local/lib/tcl8.6/init.tcl): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/lang/tcl86/work/stage/usr/local/lib/tcl8.6/package.tcl): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/lang/tcl86/work/stage/usr/local/lib/tcl8.6/parray.tcl): No such file or directory

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/tcl86
*** Error code 1

make showconfig for tcl86:

===> The following configuration options are available for tcl86-8.6.2:
     MODULES=off: Install Tcl common modules
     TCLMAN=off: Install Tcl function manpages
     THREADS=on: Threading support
     TZDATA=off: Install Tcl timezone data
